VARIANT: #  CAMERA + ROTATION  -  edit values
#  HOW THIS FILE WORKS  (VARIANT = * is the shared "variable")
#  * rows below = ONE definition per view type (HEAD
#    ANGLE-ALT
VIEWTYPE: ...) that applies to EVERY variant. Edit a view

VARIANT: #    in the * block once and it changes for all variants.
#  To make ONE variant differ
VIEWTYPE: add a row with that exact

VARIANT: #    VARIANT name (e.g. OTTOMAN below). A specific-variant row
#    OVERRIDES the * row for that variant + view only; any view
#    a variant does NOT list is inherited from the * block.
#  X / Y / Z : camera position in cm. BLANK = auto (X=0
#              Y=-width/RATIO pull-back
#  TOP view  : camera is OVERHEAD - auto becomes X=0
#              Z=width/RATIO (height)
#  RATIO     : width-to-distance pull-back (default 0.33).
#  ROT       : whole-group Z rotation in degrees. BLANK = use
#              the built-in view-type angle. Defaults shown:
#              ANGLE 35 / ANGLE-ALT -35 / BACK-ANGLE -145 / SIDE 90 /
#              SIDE-ALT -90 / HEAD 0 / BACK -180 / DETAIL 0 / TOP 0.
#              LEFT/RIGHT SIDE SOFA get a sofa override (-55 / +55)
#              from code when present; add a sofa row here to change it.
#  TX/TY/TZ  : camera TARGET position in cm. BLANK = auto
#  Match: VARIANT exact (or * = any) + VIEWTYPE in the name.
#  Lines starting with # are notes and are ignored.
#  NOTE: CSV cannot store cell colours; the # headers group
#        the rows instead (colours are lost on save to .csv).
# ===== ALL VARIANTS  ( * = the shared variable; edit a view once here ) =====
# ===== OTTOMAN  ( overrides the * rows for this variant; unlisted views inherit * ) =====
